title: Templates
subtitle: Common configuration patterns. Preview and apply to any server.
noServers: No HTTP servers configured. Create a server first before applying templates.

confirm.title: Apply "{{name}}"
confirm.selectServer: Select a server to apply {{count}} route(s) to:
confirm.description: This will add {{count}} route(s) to server "{{server}}". You can edit or remove them later.

spa.name: Single Page Application (SPA)
spa.description: Serves static files with HTML5 history mode fallback. All non-file paths serve index.html.

wordpress.name: WordPress / PHP-FPM
wordpress.description: Reverse proxy to a PHP-FPM backend with file server for static assets. Includes common security headers.

apiGateway.name: API Gateway
apiGateway.description: Route API requests to different backends by path prefix. Includes CORS headers, compression, and rate limiting paths.

loadBalanced.name: Load-Balanced Reverse Proxy
loadBalanced.description: Proxy all traffic to multiple backends with health checks and round-robin balancing.

static.name: Static File Server
static.description: Serves static files with compression, browse enabled, and proper cache headers.

wwwRedirect.name: WWW Redirect
wwwRedirect.description: Redirect all www.example.com traffic to example.com (or vice versa).
